title: cladostigma hildebrandtioides
intro: Cladostigma hildebrandtioides, also known as the East Indian climbing fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Araliaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cladostigma hildebrandtioides include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Cladostigma hildebrandtioides can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine.
